scripts.dev: cross-env PIKOT_MODE=dev PORT=3332 concurrently --kill-others "cross-env PIKOT_MODE=dev PORT=3332 npm run dev -w packages/server" "wait-on tcp:3332 && cross-env PIKOT_MODE=dev VITE_API_PORT=3332 npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.dev:server: cross-env PIKOT_MODE=dev PORT=3332 npm run dev -w packages/server
scripts.dev:client: cross-env VITE_API_PORT=3332 npm run dev -w packages/client
